title: Epic RPG: Spell Raid
description: An item that when activated attracts all enemies in the Raid to the player's position
body:
**English**

A simple mod, inspired by the bell from the Goety mod. This mod only adds one item, which, when held down for a few seconds, attracts all enemies in the current Raid.

**Features:**
🪄 Magical scroll crafted with paper and amethyst
⚔️ Teleports active raid mobs within range to the player


**Español**

Un mod simple, inspirado en la campana del mod Goety. Este mod solo agrega 1 item, que al mantenerlo precionado algunos segundos atrae a todos los enemigos de Raid actual.

**Características:**
🪄 Pergamino mágico creado con papel y amatista
⚔️ Teletransporta saqueadores activos hacia el jugador
